{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Last Leaf
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Last Leaf]] is a school whose [[sacred arts]] turn trees into deadly weapons.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
